name: @heretek-ai/openclaw-liberation
description: Liberation patch for openclaw npm package - removes safety restrictions for all versions
author: Heretek-AI Community

scripts.preinstall: echo 'Note: This package patches openclaw. Install openclaw first: npm install openclaw'
scripts.postinstall: if [ -d 'node_modules/openclaw' ]; then patch-package; else echo 'openclaw not found - skipping patch. Install openclaw: npm install openclaw'; fi
